pilots.name: 吞吐优化 smoke test
pilots.description: 验证 attention backend、torch.compile、safe batch size 与 throughput，阻止 batch_size=1 再次进入正式实验。

pass_criteria.setup_pass: Model loads, attention backend recorded, safe batch size auto-detected, throughput measured successfully
pass_criteria.setup_warn: safe batch size < 16 but blocker is explicitly documented

pilots.name: 协议修复 pilot
pilots.description: 建立 held-out calibration split、answer extraction audit 与 compute logging schema。

pass_criteria.protocol_pass: Held-out split exists and compute schema is complete for all subsequent experiments
pass_criteria.protocol_fail: Any headline evaluation still shares data with calibrator or lacks actual compute logs

pilots.name: Standard / DNB 基线 pilot
pilots.description: 建立 Standard-64 与 DNB-84 的 honest baseline，并验证 GSM8K pipeline 正常。

pass_criteria.baseline_pass: Standard-64 and DNB-84 both complete with valid accuracy and compute logs
pass_criteria.sanity_fail: Standard-64 accuracy < 30% or extractor/inference pipeline is clearly broken

pilots.name: Prophet 基线 pilot
pilots.description: 复现 Prophet 并记录 early-stop 行为与速度收益。

pass_criteria.prophet_pass: Prophet completes with valid stop statistics and compute logs
pass_criteria.prophet_warn: Quality is weak but method still serves as a valid strong baseline

pilots.name: CORE 基线 pilot
pilots.description: 复现或近似复现 CORE 风格 context-robust remasking，作为 revision 类最强对手。

pass_criteria.core_pass: Official CORE or labeled proxy completes on GSM8K pilot with valid compute logs
pass_criteria.core_warn: Proxy required, but approximation gap is explicitly documented

pilots.name: held-out calibration 诊断 pilot
pilots.description: 在独立 calibration split 上确认 overconfidence / ranking drift 是否存在，并把 calibration 定位为诊断而非方法核心。

pass_criteria.diag_pass: At least one interpretable diagnostic pattern appears (ECE, ranking drift, or revision-benefit correlation)
pass_criteria.diag_fail: Calibration is flat and uninformative even diagnostically

pilots.name: TIGER 信号筛选 pilot
pilots.description: 比较 random / raw entropy / instability 三类 revision signal，判断新方法是否值得继续。

pass_criteria.H1_pass: Instability-guided revision beats raw-entropy revision by >=1% absolute or matches with lower compute
pass_criteria.H1_fail: Instability gives no benefit over raw entropy

pivot_on_fail.H1_fail: Downgrade TIGER and prepare cand_diag as primary paper line.

pilots.name: TIGER gating / code boundary pilot
pilots.description: 验证 task gating 是否能保住 reasoning 收益并阻断 code failure。

pass_criteria.H2_pass: Gated TIGER stays within 1% of ungated TIGER on GSM8K and materially improves HumanEval failure profile
pass_criteria.H2_fail: Gating removes the reasoning gain or code still collapses

pivot_on_fail.H2_fail: Downgrade code to boundary-only appendix evidence and keep main claim strictly reasoning-only, or pivot to cand_diag if failure is severe.

pilots.name: GSM8K shortlist pilot
pilots.description: 在 pilot GSM8K 上直接测试 TIGER 是否能击败至少一个强基线。

pass_criteria.H3_pass: TIGER beats raw-entropy revision and at least one of Prophet or DNB on pilot GSM8K
pass_criteria.H3_fail: TIGER loses to both Prophet and DNB

pivot_on_fail.H3_fail: Stop scaling TIGER to full benchmarks and switch to cand_diag framing.

execution_order.description: Phase 1: throughput stack must be validated before any other pilot
Phase 2: protocol repair and held-out split creation
Phase 3: baseline reproduction and calibration diagnosis in parallel across 4 GPUs
Phase 4: decide whether the instability signal is real
Phase 5: validate task gating and code boundary behavior
Phase 6: make the go / no-go decision on TIGER before scaling to full GSM8K and MATH500

decision_tree.throughput_or_protocol_fail: Do not start any full benchmark. Fix infrastructure first.
decision_tree.H1_fail: Pivot toward cand_diag; do not claim instability-guided editing as a new method.
decision_tree.H2_fail_only: Keep reasoning-only scope and demote code to boundary analysis.
decision_tree.H3_fail: Stop method scaling and convert the campaign into a compute-normalized diagnostic benchmark study.
decision_tree.all_main_pass: Run full GSM8K, then MATH500, then synthesize Pareto results.
